channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Argentina 2026 World Cup Petition Surpasses 10 Million Signatures
item.description: A petition demanding FIFA remove Argentina from the 2026 World Cup has crossed 10 million signatures following their 2-1 victory over England in the semi-finals. The campaign gained momentum after Arg...

item.title: Sam Neill died from pneumonia after remaining cancer-free following lymphoma treatment, says his manager
item.description: Actor Sam Neill died at the age of 78 from pneumonia, according to his manager, Philip Grenz. The confirmation came shortly after the actor's family announced that he had died unexpectedly in Sydney, ...

item.title: England and Argentina set for World Cup semi-final clash with historic stakes
item.description: England and Argentina are set to face off in a highly anticipated World Cup semi-final at the Atlanta Stadium on Wednesday, July 15, 2026. The match, which pits the Three Lions against La Selección, c...

item.title: Premier Tim Houston's Speech Sparks Protests and Vehicle Incident in Nova Scotia
item.description: Nova Scotia Premier Tim Houston faced a chaotic protest scene after delivering a speech to the Annapolis Valley Chamber of Commerce at Acadia University. Initially, around 50 peaceful protesters gathe...

item.title: IEBC Clarifies Government Giveaways Aren't Automatic Voter Bribery
item.description: The article discusses the Kenya Electoral Commission (IEBC) defending government giveaways during elections, stating they don't automatically equate to voter bribery. It highlights political tensions ...

item.title: JAAC Postpones March After Mediated Settlement
item.description: The Joint Awami Action Committee (JAAC) has postponed its planned long march on Muzaffarabad for a week following back-channel negotiations aimed at resolving the ongoing standoff. The deferral comes ...

item.title: Prince William praises England's resilience after World Cup semi-final defeat
item.description: Prince William expressed his disappointment over England's 2-1 World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, commending the team's 'fight and belief' during the match. The Prince of Wales, patron of the Foo...

item.title: Error: Blocked as a crawler bot - Steps to resolve
item.description: The article details an error message from News Corp Australia, indicating that the user might have been blocked as a crawler bot. The company uses software to manage crawler traffic on its websites. I...

item.title: Nagpur Cyber Police File FIR Against Content Creators Alleged Defamatory Campaign Targeting Nitin Gadkari
item.description: The Nagpur Cyber Police have registered a First Information Report (FIR) against multiple social media content creators for allegedly conducting a defamatory digital campaign targeting Union Minister ...

item.title: Aiko Melendez Advocates Listening to Your Body for Thyroid Health
item.description: Aiko Melendez, a prominent Filipino actress and singer, recently opened up about her ongoing struggle with thyroid-related health issues. In a candid interview, she emphasized the importance of heedin...

item.title: School abductions highlight government's failure to protect education – Atiku
item.description: Atiku Abubakar, presidential candidate of the ADC, condemned the abduction of a school principal, NECO official, and students during an exam. He accused the Nigerian government of abandoning its duty ...

item.title: United Airlines Shares Dip Following Revised Revenue Outlook
item.description: United Airlines Holdings Inc. (UAL) saw its stock price decline following the release of its second-quarter earnings report, which showed a slower-than-expected revenue growth. The airline's forecast ...

item.title: Former GOP operative reveals journalist's controversial past and current activities
item.description: The article discusses Desiree Townsend, also known as Desiree Jennings, an independent journalist who has been camping outside the hospital of U.S. Senator Mitch McConnell (R-KY). During an episode of...

item.title: Federal Court Orders Forfeiture of 48 Properties Linked to Malami
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has ordered the final forfeiture of 48 properties linked to former Attorney-General Abubakar Malami to the Federal Government. Justice Joyce Abdulmalik ruled that the E...

item.title: Delhi High Court to Review Health Concerns of Climate Activist Sonam Wangchuk Amid Political Support
item.description: Climate activist Sonam Wangchuk, currently on an indefinite hunger strike at Jantar Mantar, has drawn significant political attention. The Delhi High Court has scheduled a hearing on July 16 to addres...

item.title: Shabana Mahmood Set to Become Chancellor in Burnham's New Government
item.description: Shabana Mahmood is widely anticipated to be appointed as Andy Burnham's chancellor following the prime-minister-in-waiting's inner circle rejecting Ed Miliband's initial selection. The home secretary'...

item.title: AI Guilt Hinders Discussions on Responsible Technology Use
item.description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly integrating into daily life, from classrooms to corporate environments. However, researchers warn that a growing phenomenon called 'AI guilt' is preventing essential...

item.title: Kenyan Rapper and VJ Clash Over Leaked Chats Revealing Feud Origins
item.description: Kenyan rapper Toxic Lyrikali has shared private WhatsApp messages from VJ Patelo, revealing how their public feud began. The leaked chats, spanning several months, show Patelo initially reaching out w...

item.title: Latino Voters Favor England Over Argentina in World Cup Poll
item.description: The article discusses a recent poll conducted by the National Latino Political Convention (Naleo) in Los Angeles, which reveals that Latino voters in the United States are more likely to support Engla...

item.title: France's World Cup semi-final loss to Spain sparks debate over referee decisions
item.description: French coach Didier Deschamps expressed deep disappointment after France's 2-0 World Cup semi-final defeat to Spain, questioning the officiating decisions that impacted the match. The French team, kno...
